budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: A DMG frame is 70224 cycles. Diagonal packed preparation is serialized by axis, each resident edge remains immutable, and every VBlank commits at most one 19-tile column or 21-tile row.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The retained red gate rejected the regressed roughly 74-of-90 production cadence. The longer exact-ROM window crosses row and column chunk groups plus circular background wrap without accepting that slowdown.
